description: Distinguish between dashes that need a space after them and dashes that don't.
Distinguish between hyphenated words and dashed but non-hyphenated words.
joined_fixed_hyphen: Din hija kwistjoni importanti ħafna u hija għat-tifel tiegħek.
joined_unfixed_hyphen: Din hija kwistjoni impor-tanti ħafna u hija għat-tifel tiegħek.
